title: ds-crawler meta schemas
description: Defines shared and modality-specific properties.meta fields for each euler_train.modality_type value.

depth.description: Required meta fields when euler_train.modality_type is 'depth'.

dimensions.description: Dataset-wide nominal sample dimensions keyed by semantic axis names (for example {'height': 375, 'width': 1242, 'channels': 3}). Omit this field when there is no single dataset-wide shape.

radial_depth.description: Whether the depth values represent radial (euclidean) distance from the camera rather than perpendicular (z-buffer) depth.

range.description: Value range of the depth values in meters (e.g. [0, 65535] for VKITTI2).

scale_to_meters.description: Factor that converts raw depth values to meters (e.g. 0.001 when stored in millimetres).

rgb.description: Required meta fields when euler_train.modality_type is 'rgb'.

dimensions.description: Dataset-wide nominal sample dimensions keyed by semantic axis names (for example {'height': 375, 'width': 1242, 'channels': 3}). Omit this field when there is no single dataset-wide shape.

range.description: Value range of the colour channels (e.g. [0, 255] for 8-bit or [0, 1] for normalised data).

semantic_segmentation.description: Required meta fields when euler_train.modality_type is 'semantic_segmentation'.

dimensions.description: Dataset-wide nominal sample dimensions keyed by semantic axis names (for example {'height': 375, 'width': 1242, 'channels': 3}). Omit this field when there is no single dataset-wide shape.

skyclass.description: RGB colour value identifying the sky class in the segmentation map.
